wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Tea Master.png}} {{E|Tea Master|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}, {{2|Underdocks}} and {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Bone Tea}} {{TS|negative||Pay 50 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||At the start of the next combat, Upgrade your starting hand.}}
{{Frame|Ember Tea}} {{TS|negative||Pay 150 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||At the start of the next 5 combats, gain 2 Strength.}}
{{Frame|Tea of Discourtesy}} {{TS|negative||At the start of the next combat, shuffle 2 Dazed into your Draw Pile.}} == Dialogue ==
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea. The man inside gestures to a selection of {{TS|green||teas}}, each neatly labeled with a {{{TS|gold||premium price}}.
{{Frame|Bone Tea}}
The {{TS|blue||tea master}} acknowledges your request and begins. {{TS|gold||1.}} Water from a charcoal-filled carafe is ladled into a kettle.
{{TS|gold||2.}} The kettle is heated using a gentle {{TS|purple||violet flame}}.
{{TS|gold||3.}} A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
{{TS|gold||4.}} Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
{{TS|gold||5.}} The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup. {{TS|green|up|"Tea is served."}}
{{Frame|Ember Tea}}
{{Frame|Tea of Discourtesy}}
